evals.prompt: I want to start a new Expo app called FoodTracker. It's a meal logging app. Scaffold auth and home features.
evals.expected_output: Bootstraps Expo project with latest version check, installs opinionated stack, creates folder structure, writes boilerplate for auth and home features

assertions.description: Checks latest Expo version before running CLI command (npm view expo version)
Uses create-expo-app@latest with blank-typescript template
Installs zustand, @tanstack/react-query, axios, react-hook-form, and zod
Uses Expo Router (app/_layout.tsx) not React Navigation
app/_layout.tsx wraps app in QueryClientProvider
Creates src/features/auth/ with components, hooks, screens, store, api subfolders
Creates src/features/home/ with components, hooks, screens, store, api subfolders
All generated files use TypeScript (.tsx / .ts extensions)

evals.prompt: Create a new React Native app called ShopApp — it's an e-commerce app for browsing and buying products. Use bare RN (not Expo). Scaffold auth, products, and cart.
evals.expected_output: Bootstraps bare RN project with latest version check, installs opinionated stack with React Navigation, creates folder structure, writes boilerplate for auth, products, and cart features

assertions.description: Checks latest React Native version before running CLI command (npm view react-native version)
Uses npx react-native@latest init with TypeScript template
Installs @react-navigation/native, zustand, @tanstack/react-query, axios, react-hook-form, zod, react-native-mmkv
Creates src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx with NavigationContainer
Includes pod install step for iOS
Scaffolds all three features: auth, products, and cart under src/features/
Creates src/services/api.ts (Axios instance) and src/services/storage.ts (MMKV)

evals.prompt: Add a notifications feature to my React Native project. It should have a notifications list screen and a notification detail screen.
evals.expected_output: Creates src/features/notifications/ with all subfolders, generates both list and detail screens with typed navigation props, creates store and api hooks, registers screens in navigator

assertions.description: Creates src/features/notifications/ with components, hooks, screens, store, api subfolders and types.ts
Creates NotificationsScreen (list) with proper component structure
Creates NotificationDetailScreen with proper component structure
Creates a Zustand store for notifications state
Creates a React Query (useQuery) hook for fetching notifications
Registers both new screens in the navigator / routing config
Defines Notification type and related DTOs in types.ts
